## LibraryRuntime.scaleFillingRecipe() function

Scales a filling recipe to a target weight.

This function looks up a version by spec and delegates to . Use this when you have a filling recipe and want to scale a specific version by spec.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function scaleFillingRecipe(fillingRecipe: IFillingRecipe, fillingId: FillingId, targetWeight: Measurement, options?: IFillingRecipeScaleOptions): Result<IComputedScaledFillingRecipe>;
```
